attributes.description: AWS Lambda dashboard for CloudWatch metrics collected by the OpenTelemetry Collector.
attributes.title: [AWS OTel] Lambda

embeddableConfig.description:
Monitor AWS Lambda functions across your infrastructure in real time.
Filter by function at the top. Spot cold starts, errors, and duration outliers in the summary table then click any function to drill down.
To get started, instrument your Lambda functions with the Elastic agent.
Total number of Lambda functions — distinct functions reporting metrics in the latest collected data for the selected time range.

attributes.description: Total number of Lambda functions — distinct functions reporting metrics in the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != ""
  AND stat == "Sum"
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY FunctionName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest_global) <= 5
| STATS total = COUNT(*)
| KEEP total

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != ""
  AND stat == "Sum"
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY FunctionName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest_global) <= 5
| STATS total = COUNT(*)
| KEEP total

embeddableConfig.title: Functions by status
embeddableConfig.description: Share of Lambda functions by status — erroring (errors > 0), throttled (throttles > 0), idle (no invocations), or healthy. Based on totals over the selected time range. A growing erroring slice indicates failing functions.

attributes.title: Functions by status
attributes.description: Share of Lambda functions by status — erroring (errors > 0), throttled (throttles > 0), idle (no invocations), or healthy. Based on totals over the selected time range. A growing erroring slice indicates failing functions.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != "" AND Resource IS NULL
| WHERE stat == "Sum"
| STATS f_inv = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`)),
    f_err = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`)),
    f_thr = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`)),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY FunctionName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest_global) <= 5
| EVAL lambda_state = CASE(
    f_err > 0, "erroring",
    f_thr > 0, "throttled",
    f_inv >= 0, "healthy",
    "Unknown")
| STATS functions = COUNT(*) BY lambda_state

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != "" AND Resource IS NULL
| WHERE stat == "Sum"
| STATS f_inv = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`)),
    f_err = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`)),
    f_thr = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`)),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY FunctionName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest_global) <= 5
| EVAL lambda_state = CASE(
    f_err > 0, "erroring",
    f_thr > 0, "throttled",
    f_inv >= 0, "healthy",
    "Unknown")
| STATS functions = COUNT(*) BY lambda_state

embeddableConfig.title: Function count over time
embeddableConfig.description: Count of distinct Lambda functions over time, classified per time bucket by status (total, erroring, throttled, healthy, idle). A rising erroring series indicates spreading failures.

attributes.title: Function count over time
attributes.description: Count of distinct Lambda functions over time, classified per time bucket by status (total, erroring, throttled, healthy, idle). A rising erroring series indicates spreading failures.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != "" AND Resource IS NULL
| WHERE stat == "Sum"
| STATS f_inv = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`)),
    f_err = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`)),
    f_thr = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), FunctionName, cloud.region
| EVAL state = CASE(
    f_err > 0, "erroring",
    f_thr > 0, "throttled",
    f_inv >= 0, "healthy",
    "Unknown")
| STATS total = COUNT(*),
    erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "erroring",
    throttled = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "throttled",
    healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy"
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != "" AND Resource IS NULL
| WHERE stat == "Sum"
| STATS f_inv = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`)),
    f_err = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`)),
    f_thr = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), FunctionName, cloud.region
| EVAL state = CASE(
    f_err > 0, "erroring",
    f_thr > 0, "throttled",
    f_inv >= 0, "healthy",
    "Unknown")
| STATS total = COUNT(*),
    erroring = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "erroring",
    throttled = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "throttled",
    healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE state == "healthy"
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Number of erroring Lambda functions — distinct functions with at least one error over the selected time range. A non-zero count indicates failing invocations.

embeddableConfig.description: Number of healthy Lambda functions — invoked at least once with no errors or throttles over the selected time range.

attributes.description: Number of healthy Lambda functions — invoked at least once with no errors or throttles over the selected time range.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != "" AND Resource IS NULL
| WHERE stat == "Sum"
| STATS f_inv = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`)),
    f_err = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`)),
    f_thr = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`)),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY FunctionName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest_global) <= 5
| STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE f_inv >= 0 AND (f_err == 0 OR f_err IS NULL) AND (f_thr == 0 OR f_thr IS NULL)
| KEEP healthy

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != "" AND Resource IS NULL
| WHERE stat == "Sum"
| STATS f_inv = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`)),
    f_err = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`)),
    f_thr = SUM(sum_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`)),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY FunctionName, cloud.region
| INLINE STATS latest_global = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minutes", last_seen, latest_global) <= 5
| STATS healthy = COUNT(*) WHERE f_inv >= 0 AND (f_err == 0 OR f_err IS NULL) AND (f_thr == 0 OR f_thr IS NULL)
| KEEP healthy

embeddableConfig.title: Lambda functions — hexagon map (click an hex for actions)
embeddableConfig.description: One hexagon per Lambda function, ordered worst-first with erroring or throttled functions first. Toggle Color by between Status, Errors, or Duration; metric views support Sum for errors and Min, Max, Avg, and Last for duration over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that function.

savedVis.title: Lambda functions — hexagon map
savedVis.description: One hexagon per Lambda function, ordered worst-first with erroring or throttled functions first. Toggle Color by between Status, Errors, or Duration; metric views support Sum for errors and Min, Max, Avg, and Last for duration over the dashboard time range. Click any hexagon to filter the dashboard or open metrics for that function.

embeddableConfig.title: Functions
embeddableConfig.description: All Lambda functions, ranked worst-first by status. Click a function to drill into its metrics. Invocations, errors, and throttles are totals summed over the selected time range; avg and max duration are the average and peak execution time (ms); max concurrency is the peak concurrent executions over the range.

attributes.title: Functions
attributes.description: All Lambda functions, ranked worst-first by status. Click a function to drill into its metrics. Invocations, errors, and throttles are totals summed over the selected time range; avg and max duration are the average and peak execution time (ms); max concurrency is the peak concurrent executions over the range.

query.esql:
SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != "" AND Resource IS NULL
  AND stat IN ("Average", "Maximum", "Sum")
| STATS
    c_inv = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL))),
    c_err = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL))),
    c_thr = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`, NULL))),
    c_dur_avg = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Duration`, NULL))),
    c_dur_max = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Duration`, NULL))),
    c_conc_max = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/ConcurrentExecutions`, NULL)))
  BY FunctionName, c_account = cloud.account.id, c_region = cloud.region
| EVAL
    c_state_sort = CASE(
      c_err > 0, 1,
      c_thr > 0, 2,
      c_inv >= 0, 3,
      4),
    c_state = CASE(
      c_err > 0, "erroring",
      c_thr > 0, "throttled",
      c_inv >= 0, "healthy",
      "Unknown")
| SORT c_state_sort ASC

SET unmapped_fields = "nullify";
TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-*
| WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != "" AND Resource IS NULL
  AND stat IN ("Average", "Maximum", "Sum")
| STATS
    c_inv = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Invocations`, NULL))),
    c_err = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Errors`, NULL))),
    c_thr = SUM(SUM_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Sum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Throttles`, NULL))),
    c_dur_avg = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Average", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Duration`, NULL))),
    c_dur_max = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Duration`, NULL))),
    c_conc_max = MAX(MAX_OVER_TIME(CASE(stat == "Maximum", `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/ConcurrentExecutions`, NULL)))
  BY FunctionName, c_account = cloud.account.id, c_region = cloud.region
| EVAL
    c_state_sort = CASE(
      c_err > 0, 1,
      c_thr > 0, 2,
      c_inv >= 0, 3,
      4),
    c_state = CASE(
      c_err > 0, "erroring",
      c_thr > 0, "throttled",
      c_inv >= 0, "healthy",
      "Unknown")
| SORT c_state_sort ASC

query.esql:

TS metrics-aws.lambda.otel-* | WHERE FunctionName IS NOT NULL AND FunctionName != "" AND Resource IS NULL AND `metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Duration` IS NOT NULL | WHERE stat == "Average" | STATS metric = AVG(avg_over_time(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/Lambda/Duration`)) BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), FunctionName, cloud.region | SORT timestamp ASC, metric DESC, FunctionName ASC | LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
